_meta.title: SEALED 2016 — 30-sec hook film v6
_meta.purpose: Top-of-funnel hook for SEALED book, 16:9 long-form variant. Re-uses existing v5 VO segments — no ElevenLabs re-render needed.
_meta.driver_note: produce-from-storyboard.py --dry-run output: $2.18 deterministic (6 clips, no VO — reuses v5 segments). _meta total adds ~$2.11 retry buffer.

cost_breakdown.notes: 20s of Sora 2 + 10s of Kling i2v + 2 stills. Buffer covers ~1 re-render per video-clip.

clips.covers_script_section: Hook — drone over America at golden hour, parchment seal envelope falling
clips.prompt: Cinematic ten-thousand-foot drone shot over a generic American landscape at golden hour, slow rotation, soft golden clouds. A single parchment envelope marked with a wax seal falls in slow motion through the clouds. Documentary-film aesthetic, no text on the envelope, no flags, no identifiable buildings.

clips.covers_script_section: 2015 — campaign-era Trump rally beat (i2v on Wikimedia photo)
clips.prompt: Subtle motion: Donald Trump at a podium, slight head turn, microphones visible, documentary realism, no crowd movement, no flags swaying, restrained.
Subtle motion: Donald Trump at a desk signing a document with a black pen, looks down then up at the camera with measured expression, documentary realism, no additional people enter the frame.

Newspaper-broadsheet style SVG verdict card on cream paper: large serif headline 'THE 2016 PROMISE AUDIT' with four numbered tiles below — '46 KEPT' (navy), '51 PARTIAL' (slate), '40 BROKEN' (red), '8 READER-DECIDES' (gold). Restrained civic palette, no faces, no flags.

Cinematic close-up of a printed policy document on a wooden desk, slowly dissolving into floating particles of paper that drift upward into darkness. Soft warm desk lamp, documentary realism, no text legible on the page.
End card on cream paper: 'SEALED. The 2016 Promises. Before the Deals.' in classic serif type, with sub-line 'SEALED2016.COM' in small caps. Civic-document aesthetic, no flags, no faces.
